Interface ITelecomDomainNetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a telecom domain network.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("80243602-BCA7-40BD-972F-E7205848DFF1")]
public interface ITelecomDomainNetwork : IDomainNetwork

Properties

CircuitProperties

Return the circuit property set of this telecom domain network.

IPropertySet CircuitProperties { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Return the circuit user attributes of this telecom domain network.

IArray CircuitUserAttributes { get; }
